description: Full development permissions for developer roles (backend-developer, frontend-developer, dba, devops-engineer, qa-engineer). Extends base.json with write and execution permissions.

pre-commit.description: Run automated code review checks before committing

pre-tool.description: Enforce role-specific file boundaries even in full-access mode

rules: You have full write access but must still respect role boundaries enforced by the pre-tool guard.
Always read files before modifying them.
Run the linter or type checker after making changes to verify correctness.
Write tests for new functionality. Do not skip testing.
Never add new dependencies without documenting the reason and getting user confirmation.
Never force-push or rewrite history on shared branches.
Keep commits atomic: one logical change per commit.
Do not modify files outside your role's scope without switching roles first.
